ComponentsProperties.Name: size
ComponentsProperties.Description: 面板大小(像素或百分比)

ComponentsProperties.Name: min
ComponentsProperties.Description: 面板最小尺寸(像素或百分比)

ComponentsProperties.Name: max
ComponentsProperties.Description: 面板的最大尺寸(像素或百分比)

ComponentsProperties.Name: resizable
ComponentsProperties.Description: 是否可以调整面板大小

ComponentSlots.Name: start-collapsible
ComponentSlots.Description: 自定义起始折叠按钮的内容

ComponentSlots.Name: end-collapsible
ComponentSlots.Description: 结束可折叠按钮的自定义内容

ComponentEvents.Name: update:size
ComponentEvents.Description: 当面板大小改变时触发
